rulings.Case Title: SMART BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. JANE MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Invalidate Mechanics Lien Of Smart Builders, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday July 29, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT JANE MARTIN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Invalidate Mechanics Lien Of Smart Builders, Inc. OFF CALENDAR. The motion may be re-filed after parties file a proper notice that Bankruptcy stay was lifted. No evidence provided that Notice of Abandonment was served or that there were no timely objections to the Notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday July 29, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend GRANTED. No opposition filed. Action is dismissed with prejudice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, N.A.S Continued Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend; Declaration Of David M. Liu In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday July 29, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. Defendant JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.S Continued Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Amend OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LANDMARK REALTY, LLC VS. GENARO VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday July 29, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT GENARO VASQUEZ, VICTOR SANTANA GONGORA, SANTIAGO CAAMAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. First Amended Complained filed on July 26, 2016 in violation of CCP 472(a) is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE N. LEE VS. HAI PING LI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday July 29, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT HAI LI, ANNIE HE, KEVIN HE MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS OFF CALENDAR, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. No courtesy copy of the motion papers provided. = (501/REQ)
